subject: MATHEMATICS
name: Addition as Grouping
description: Understanding addition as combining groups of objects

subject: MATHEMATICS
name: Skip Counting
description: Counting by 2s, 5s, 10s to prepare for multiplication

subject: PHYSICS
name: Pushes and Pulls
description: Forces cause objects to move or change

subject: CHEMISTRY
name: States of Matter
description: Solids, liquids, and gases — and how heat changes them

subject: CHEMISTRY
name: Mixtures
description: Combining two or more materials that can be separated

subject: CHEMISTRY
name: Solutions
description: One substance dissolves into another (like sugar in water)

subject: MATHEMATICS
name: Introduction to Fractions
description: Parts of a whole — halves, thirds, quarters

subject: PHYSICS
name: Friction
description: A force that slows things down when surfaces rub together

subject: PHYSICS
name: Balance and Weight
description: Heavier objects need more force to balance; seesaws show this

subject: PHYSICS
name: Light and Shadows
description: Shadows form when objects block light; shadow length depends on the sun's angle

subject: MATHEMATICS
name: Symmetry
description: A shape is symmetrical when both sides mirror each other

subject: PHYSICS
name: Density and Floating
description: Dense objects sink; less dense objects float — it's about how tightly packed the matter is

subject: MATHEMATICS
name: Subtraction
description: Taking away from a group to find how many are left
